title: mentha × rotundifolia f. genuina
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. genuina, also known as round-leaved mint, is a subspecies of the hybrid mint plant. As a plant with medicinal properties, it has been traditionally used to aid digestion, relieve nausea, and ease respiratory issues, such as colds and congestion. The health benefits of round-leaved mint include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a valuable addition to a healthy lifestyle. Round-leaved mint can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or added to food and drinks, taking advantage of its refreshing flavor and medicinal properties.
